headlines.description: — Justin Fields got his first extended look as a pro. And it might be a long-term arrangement.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fields takes over for injured Dalton, Bears beat Bengals

headlines.description: — Baker Mayfield wasn't missing a snap. So once his left shoulder got popped back into its socket, there was no stopping him.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield shakes off injury, leads Browns past Texans 31-21

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford refused to let a sore right thumb derail his Sunday plans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford leads Rams to late scores in  27-24 win over Colts

headlines.description: — Another Buffalo-Miami game, another lopsided Bills victory. And this one might wind up hurting the Dolphins more than most of the others.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills knock out Tua, roll past Dolphins yet again, win 35-0

events.name: New England Patriots at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Mac Jones kept his mistakes to a minimum, moved the ball down the field and did enough to earn his first NFL victory with the New England Patriots.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones, Patriots breeze past Jets as Wilson throws 4 INTs

headlines.description: — Jimmy Garoppolo wasn't thinking about Trey Lance coming into the game. He was too busy using his own legs to convert first downs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jimmy Garoppolo, Nick Bosa lead 49ers past Eagles 17-11

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Jon Gruden's long, arduous multi-state, multi-year rebuilding project may finally be nearing its end.
headlines.shortLinkText: Carr throws for 382 yards, Raiders top Steelers 26-17

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — Through two games, quarterback Sam Darnold is thriving in Carolina.
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold throws 2 TDs, Panthers D dominates Saints 26-7

headlines.description: — Courtland Sutton re-established himself as Denver's go-to guy with a career day.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sutton's career day helps Broncos beat woeful Jaguars 23-13

headlines.description: — Arizona's Jordan Hicks didn't dare turn around as Minnesota's potential game-winning field goal floated toward the uprights. Instead, he watched the videoboard for a moment and then locked eyes with Ezekial Turner, who had been knocked to the turf,...
headlines.shortLinkText: Cards win 34-33 thriller after Vikings miss last-second FG

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — It's good to be 2-0 with a franchise-best 10-game winning streak and an even more impressive run of nine straight 30-plus point performances in a victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady has 276 yards, 5 TDs; Buccaneers rout Falcons 48-25

events.name: Dallas Cowboys at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Throughout his rehab from a broken ankle last season, Dak Prescott thought about what it would feel like to be on the field again and lead the Dallas Cowboys on a game-winning drive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zuerlein makes 56-yarder on last play, Cowboys beat Chargers

headlines.description: — Derrick Henry and the Tennessee Titans found a way to silence Seattle's notorious noise that hadn't been heard for nearly two years.
headlines.shortLinkText: King Henry leads Titans' late rally to stun Seahawks 33-30

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Baltimore Ravens

headlines.description: — With a vault and a jump pass, and all the confidence from his coach and teammates he could ask for, Lamar Jackson finally beat Patrick Mahomes and Kansas City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamar Jackson finally leads Ravens over Chiefs 36-35
